title: Zhipu AI GLM 5.2 now available as a Databricks-hosted model
body:
Model Serving now supports [GLM 5.2](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#glm-5-2) as a Databricks-hosted model. This mixture of experts (MoE) model supports a 1 million token context window and is optimized for long-horizon reasoning, coding, and agentic tool use. You can access this model using [Foundation Model APIs](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis).

Customers are responsible for ensuring their compliance with [applicable terms](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/acceptable-use-models).
